2605.14679.title: AI-assisted cultural heritage dissemination: Comparing NMT and glossary-augmented LLM translation in rock art documents
2605.14679.paper_summary: Cultural heritage institutions increasingly disseminate research and interpretive materials globally, but multilingual dissemination is constrained by limited budgets and staffing. In terminology-dense domains such as rock art, translation quality depends on accurate, consistent specialised terms, and small lexical errors can mislead non-specialists and reduce reuse. We compare three English MT setups for a Spanish academic rock art text, focusing on simple, operationally feasible interventions rather than complex model-side modifications: (1) DeepL as a strong NMT baseline, (2) Gemini-Simple (LLM with a basic prompt), and (3) Gemini-RAG (the same LLM with glossary-augmented prompting via term-pair retrieval). Using PEARMUT, we conduct a human evaluation via (i) multi-way Direct Assessment (0--100) and (ii) targeted terminology auditing with a restricted MQM taxonomy. Gemini-RAG yields the highest exact-match terminology accuracy (81.4\%), versus Gemini-Simple (69.1\%) and DeepL (64.4\%), while preserving overall quality (mean DA 85.3 Gemini-RAG vs. 85.2 Gemini-Simple), outperforming DeepL (80.3). These results show that glossary-augmented prompting is a low-overhead way to improve terminology control in cultural-heritage translation if institutions maintain minimal terminology resources and lightweight evaluation procedures.
2605.14679.paper_summary_zh: 文化遺產機構越來越多地在全球範圍內傳播研究和詮釋材料，但多語言的傳播受到預算和人力資源有限的限制。在像岩畫這樣術語密集的領域中，翻譯質量取決於準確、一致的專業術語，而小的詞彙錯誤可能會誤導非專家並減少重用。我們比較了三種英語機器翻譯設置，針對一篇西班牙學術岩畫文本，重點在於簡單、可操作的干預措施，而非複雜的模型側修改：(1) DeepL作為強大的神經機器翻譯基準，(2) Gemini-Simple（帶有基本提示的LLM），以及(3) Gemini-RAG（同一LLM通過術語對檢索進行詞彙增強提示）。使用PEARMUT，我們通過(i) 多方直接評估（0--100）和(ii) 使用限制的MQM分類進行針對性術語審核來進行人類評估。Gemini-RAG產生了最高的精確匹配術語準確率（81.4%），而Gemini-Simple為（69.1%），DeepL為（64.4%），同時保持整體質量（平均DA 85.3 Gemini-RAG對85.2 Gemini-Simple），超越DeepL（80.3）。這些結果顯示，詞彙增強提示是一種低開銷的方式，可以改善文化遺產翻譯中的術語控制，前提是機構保持最低限度的術語資源和輕量級的評估程序。
2605.14679.author: Vicent Briva-Iglesias et.al.
